news.title: Seoul stocks soar in Asia tech rally after Micron's blowout forecast
news.summary: South Korea's Kospi soared more than five percent in a tech-led surge across Asia on Thursday as a forecast-busting earnings report from US chip titan Micron helped traders brush off their latest worries about the AI investment boom.While Wall Street has suffered, the selling has been particularly painful in Seoul, where the Kospi -- which has hit multiple records this year -- plunged 10 percent on Tuesday with chip giants SK hynix and Samsung taking the brunt of the action.

news.title: Treasury Yields Edge Higher as Investors Await PCE Data
news.summary: U.S. Treasury yields edged higher in Asian trade, slightly more so on the short end of the curve, signaling market expectations of Federal Reserve interest-rate hikes. Meanwhile, oil prices fell to pre-Iran war levels and investors await PCE data, the Fed's favored inflation gauge.
